description: Bertanggung jawab dalam mengelola dan menganalisisdata operasional yang terkait dengan perencanaan, pengadaan, distribusi, dan pengendalian BMHP.
jobDescriptionHtml:
Lini Bisnis: Bahan Medis Habis Pakai (BMHP)

1. Kualifikasi Pendidikan

  • Pendidikan minimal S1:

    • Teknik Industri

    • Statistika

    • Sistem Informasi

    • Informatika

    • Manajemen (konsentrasi operasional/logistik)

    • atau bidang lain yang relevan

  • Pendidikan S2 di bidang Data Analytics / Manajemen Operasi / Supply Chain menjadi nilai tambah.

2. Pengalaman Kerja

  • Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 2–3 tahun sebagai:

    • Data Analyst

    • Data Officer

    • Analis Operasional / Logistik

    • Pengolah Data Proyek

  • Berpengalaman mengolah data pada sektor:

    • Alat kesehatan

    • Bahan medis habis pakai

    • Rumah sakit, distributor, atau pengadaan pemerintah (nilai tambah)

3. Kompetensi Teknis Utama

  • Mampu melakukan pengolahan, analisis, dan visualisasi data dalam skala operasional dan bisnis.

  • Memahami alur bisnis BMHP: perencanaan, pengadaan, distribusi, dan penggunaan.

  • Menguasai:

    • Microsoft Excel (lanjutan): Pivot Table, Power Query, Lookup, Dashboard

    • Microsoft PowerPoint untuk penyajian laporan analitis

  • Mampu menyusun database operasional BMHP (stok, pemakaian, kedaluwarsa, penjualan).

4. Sistem & Tools (Nilai Tambah)

  • Pengalaman menggunakan:

    • ERP / sistem logistik (misalnya Odoo, SAP, atau SIMRS)

    • Business Intelligence Tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

  • Dasar pemrograman SQL / Python / R untuk pengolahan data menjadi nilai tambah.

5. Kompetensi Analitis & Bisnis

  • Mampu melakukan:

    • Analisis tren penggunaan dan penjualan BMHP

    • Analisis efisiensi stok dan perputaran barang

    • Forecasting kebutuhan BMHP berbasis data historis

  • Mampu menyajikan data menjadi rekomendasi strategis bagi manajemen.

6. Kemampuan Administratif & Dokumentasi

  • Mampu menyusun:

    • Laporan periodik (harian, bulanan, tahunan)

    • Rekap data operasional dan bisnis

    • Data pendukung audit dan evaluasi proyek

  • Memahami prinsip akurasi, validasi, dan keamanan data.

7. Soft Skills

  • Teliti, sistematis, dan memiliki perhatian tinggi terhadap detail.

  • Mampu bekerja dengan data dalam jumlah besar dan tenggat waktu ketat.

  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menjelaskan hasil analisis kepada tim non-teknis.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim lintas fungsi.

8. Etika Kerja & Kepatuhan

  • Menjunjung tinggi kerahasiaan dan integritas data.

  • Memahami kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan internal perusahaan dan regulasi sektor kesehatan.

9. Persyaratan Umum

  • Sehat jasmani dan rohani.

  • Bersedia bekerja dengan sistem target dan deadline.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan sesuai kebutuhan lini bisnis/proyek.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are looking for an analytical and business-oriented IT Data Scientist to support data-driven decision-making across the organization. This role will focus on developing predictive models, extracting insights from complex datasets, and translating analytical results into actionable business recommendations.

You will work closely with IT, business, and analytics stakeholders to drive value through data, improve operational performance, and support strategic initiatives.


Responsibilities

  • Analyze large, structured, and unstructured datasets to identify trends, patterns, and business insights.

  • Develop, validate, and deploy statistical models, machine learning algorithms, and predictive analytics solutions.

  • Translate complex data findings into clear insights and recommendations for business stakeholders.

  • Collaborate with data engineers and IT teams to ensure data quality, availability, and scalability.

  • Design and maintain dashboards, reports, and data visualizations to support decision-making.

  • Support experimentation, forecasting, and scenario analysis to improve business outcomes.

  • Ensure adherence to data governance, security, and compliance standards.

  • Document models, methodologies, and analytical processes.


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field.

  • Proven experience in data analysis, data science, or advanced analytics roles.

  • Strong proficiency in Python or R, SQL, and data manipulation techniques.

  • Familiarity with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau).

  • Strong understanding of probability, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.

  • Experience working with large datasets and cloud-based analytics platforms is an advantage.

description: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and transformations to ensure reliable data flow and optimized data models across systems.
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows.

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization.


Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration.

  2. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

  3. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies.

  5. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability.

  6. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus.

  • Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome.

  • Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow.

  • Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation.

  • Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis.

  • Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions.

  • Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment.

Technical skills:

  • SQL, Python, or Scala.

  • TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend).

  • Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift).

  • CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins)

Soft skills:

  • Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions.

  • Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value.

  • Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users.

  • Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs.

  • Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes.

  • Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a Data Scientist / AI & Machine Learning Engineer with strong experience in building end-to-end Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions. This role will be responsible for designing scalable AI architectures, developing predictive and Generative AI models (RAG, Agentic AI), and deploying production-ready solutions on cloud platforms such as Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with MLOps, large-scale data processing, and delivering AI solutions in real-world enterprise environments.


Job Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deploy Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions.

  • Build and maintain end-to-end ML pipelines, including data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, deployment, and monitoring.

  • Develop Generative AI applications, such as:

    • LLM-based chatbots

    • Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

    • Agentic AI / Multi-Agent systems using LangChain and LangGraph

  • Design and implement cloud architectures on Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Dialogflow, etc.) and/or AWS.

  • Develop and optimize models for forecasting, classification, and regression use cases.

  • Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, and engineers to translate business requirements into AI-driven solutions.

  • Optimize model performance, scalability, and reliability in production environments.

  • Apply MLOps best practices, including CI/CD for ML, automation, and monitoring.

  • Provide technical leadership, guidance, and best practices to team members.


Job Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Informatics, Data Science, or related fields (Master’s degree is a plus).

  • 1+ years of experience as a Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, or AI Engineer.

  • Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in:

    • Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI

    • MLOps and automated ML pipelines

  • Proficiency in Python (required); experience with R, Javascript, or C++ is a plus.

  • Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage, etc.).

  • Experience with AWS is a plus.

  • Experience with Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB) and relational/non-relational databases.

  • Proven experience developing LLM-based applications, including chatbots, RAG, and Agentic AI.

  • Solid understanding of cloud architecture, data engineering, and scalable systems.

  • Cloud and/or Machine Learning certifications (e.g., Google Cloud, Professional ML Engineer) are a strong plus.

  • Strong problem-solving skills, good communication abilities, and the ability to work independently or in a team.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengumpulkan, membersihkan, dan menganalisis data dari berbagai sumber untuk mengidentifikasi tren, pola, dan wawasan yang berharga.

  • Merancang dan mengembangkan dashboard dan laporan untuk menyajikan data secara visual dan mudah dipahami.

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim fungsional lainnya untuk memahami kebutuhan bisnis dan menggunakan data untuk memberikan solusi yang berdampak.

  • Menggunakan alat analitik canggih, termasuk perangkat lunak statistik dan pemodelan, untuk menghasilkan analisis yang akurat dan tepat waktu.

  • Mengidentifikasi peluang untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan efektivitas proses bisnis dengan memanfaatkan data.

  • Membuat presentasi dan laporan yang jelas dan meyakinkan untuk mengkomunikasikan temuan kepada pemangku kepentingan.

Keterampilan dan Kualifikasi

  • Gelar sarjana di bidang Matematika, Statistik, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait.

  • Minimal 3 tahun pengalaman bekerja sebagai Data Analyst atau peran terkait data.

  • Mahir dalam menggunakan alat analisis data seperti SQL, Python, R, atau Tableau.

  • Kemampuan pemecahan masalah dan berpikir kritis yang kuat.

  • Kemampuan berkomunikasi yang baik, baik secara lisan maupun tertulis, untuk menyampaikan temuan dan wawasan.

  • Pemahaman yang baik tentang metodologi analisis data dan teknik visualisasi data.

  • Kemampuan untuk bekerja dalam tim dan berkolaborasi dengan berbagai pemangku kepentingan.

Tentang PT 360 TEKNOLOGI INDONESIA'
PT 360 TEKNOLOGI INDONESIA' adalah perusahaan teknologi inovatif yang berfokus pada pengembangan solusi digital terkemuka. Kami berkomitmen untuk membantu organisasi memanfaatkan kekuatan data dan teknologi untuk mencapai hasil yang lebih baik. Tim kami terdiri dari profesional berbakat yang didorong oleh semangat inovasi dan keinginan untuk membuat perbedaan. Jika Anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan kami dalam perjalanan kami, lamar posisi ini sekarang!

description: Evaluate AI in real-world developer workflows. No AI background needed. Create terminal challenges and solutions, fully remote.
jobDescriptionHtml:
ABOUT THE PROJECT
The Terminal Bench Project evaluates and improves how Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and Claude perform in real-world developer environments (terminal-based workflows).
 
This is not a simple labeling job. Your role is to create practical, real-world development tasks that test whether an AI model can solve problems like an actual developer.

You will design terminal-style developer challenges (Prompts) and write detailed solutions (Solutions) that demonstrate the correct reasoning and steps.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

  • Create realistic terminal-based development problems (Prompts)

  • Write clear, correct solution steps and final answers (Solutions)

    Production software development is not required.
    You may freely design tasks within your own technical expertise.


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR
You are a good fit if you have experience in any of the following areas:

  • System configuration & environment setup

  • Build, compilation, and dependency management

  • Data/file processing (ETL) and scripting

  • General software engineering

  • Debugging & troubleshooting

  • Interactive systems, simulation, or game-related development

  • Search engine development

  • Compiler or language tooling development

Even if your experience is not listed here, we are always excited to meet engineers with broad domain knowledge and the motivation to explore new challenges. Feel free to apply.

COMPENSATION & WORK STYLE

  • Rp 410,000 / hour

  • Fully remote - Work from anywhere, on your own schedule

  • Participate at your own pace based on your schedule

PROJECT DURATION

  • Long-term project: 6+ months(minimum)

  • Preference for contributors available for long-term participation

PROCESS

  1. Resume Screening

  2. Screening Test

  3. Onboarding Session for Selected Candidates

  4. Join Our Project!

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your application, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next step.

description: Software Engineer in dynamic tech firm - gain valuable experience, collaborate with cross-functional teams.
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the position

Join our team at HITHINK TECHNOLOGY INDONESIA as Software Engineers (Japanese Speaker). This is a full-time position based in South Jakarta, Jakarta, offering you the opportunity to develop your skills and gain valuable experience in a dynamic, fast-paced technology environment.

Job Desc & Summary:

Responsible for designing, developing, testing, and deploying high-complexity software systems. Ensures code quality, system reliability, and performance through rigorous development practices and leadership in standards enforcement. Provides technical guidance, mentors junior engineers, and supports continuous improvement across the software development lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Software Development & Code Quality

  • Develop high-complexity core modules with optimized and maintainable code.

  • Conduct in-depth code reviews for critical components.

  • Resolve complex software defects and ensure system stability.

2. Testing & Quality Assurance

  • Create and evaluate comprehensive unit and integration test cases.

  • Perform module-level and system-level testing.

  • Analyze test outcomes to recommend architectural improvements.

3. Deployment & Support

  • Prepare and validate production deliverables.

  • Oversee on-site deployments (installation, configuration, debugging).

  • Troubleshoot UAT and post-launch issues.

  • Provide Level 3 technical support for critical incidents.

4. System Design & Standards

  • Contribute to high-level and detailed system design, especially for complex functionalities.

  • Enforce software design standards and best practices.

  • Review and explain designs to development teams.

5. Learning, Documentation & Knowledge Sharing

  • Support knowledge management through documentation and training material.

  • Assist with integration testing and detailed design under mentorship.

  • Attend and contribute to system design training programs.

6. Leadership & Mentoring

  • Mentor junior engineers and conduct technical training sessions.

  • Share expertise in tools, frameworks, and methodologies.

  • Foster a culture of continuous learning and best practices.

7. Delivery & User Support

  • Contribute to user manuals and assist in user acceptance testing.

  • Support end-to-end system and acceptance testing phases.

8. Ad-hoc Tasks

  • Execute additional tasks and special assignments from management as needed.


Qualifications:

  1. Bachelor's or master's degree graduates with majors related to science and engineering, such as computer science, software engineering, big data, cloud computing, Internet of Things, network engineering, information, communication, electronics, etc.

  2. Language Requirements: Fluent bilingual communication (Listening/Speaking/Reading/Writing) in Japanese Language (Minimum JLPT N3) or English.

  3. Optional Language Requirements: Mandarin Language (Minimum HSK 4).

  4. Over 2-3 years of professional software development experience and at least 3 years in system design and development.

  5. A minimum of 2 years of hands-on project development experience is required. Experience in OS/Middleware migration is a plus.

  6. Computer language skills: Java, UI: Experience with Spring Framework b) Batch: DB-access Java programming 2) VB: a) UI/Batch: VB.net or .NET experience (for field terminals).

  7. Preferred Skills (Want): ProC:* Development skills or C + SQL proficiency (needed only for legacy code analysis, not new development).

  8. The ideal candidate has led detailed design for at least two small-scale systems, including creating functional and technical specifications, database and interface design, and system architecture documentation.

Other Supporting Skill & Experience:

  1. System Design Tools Proficient in industry-standard design tools.

  2. Power Designer (data modeling, system architecture) (Additional examples: Enterprise Architect, Visio, Lucid chart).

  3. Proficient skills in office suites: • Microsoft 365 (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).

  4. Collaborative tools (Confluence, Google Workspace).

  5. Infrastructure Management Hands-on experience with: • OS administration (Windows Server/Linux) • Network configuration (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN) • Hardware maintenance (servers, workstations).

  6. Testing Tools Working knowledge such as: • Test management (JIRA, TestRail) • Automation tools (Selenium, Postman) • Load testing (JMeter).

If you're ready to embark on an exciting and rewarding journey for this position, we encourage you to apply now!

description: Bertanggung jawab dalam mengelola dan menganalisisdata operasional yang terkait dengan perencanaan, pengadaan, distribusi, dan pengendalian BMHP.
jobDescriptionHtml:
Lini Bisnis: Bahan Medis Habis Pakai (BMHP)

1. Kualifikasi Pendidikan

  • Pendidikan minimal S1:

    • Statistika

    • atau bidang lain yang relevan

  • Pendidikan S2 di bidang Data Analytics / Manajemen Operasi / Supply Chain menjadi nilai tambah.

2. Pengalaman Kerja

  • Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 2–3 tahun sebagai:

    • Data Analyst

    • Data Officer

    • Analis Operasional / Logistik

    • Pengolah Data Proyek

  • Berpengalaman mengolah data pada sektor:

    • Alat kesehatan

    • Bahan medis habis pakai

    • Rumah sakit, distributor, atau pengadaan pemerintah (nilai tambah)

3. Kompetensi Teknis Utama

  • Mampu melakukan pengolahan, analisis, dan visualisasi data dalam skala operasional dan bisnis.

  • Memahami alur bisnis BMHP: perencanaan, pengadaan, distribusi, dan penggunaan.

  • Menguasai:

    • Microsoft Excel (lanjutan): Pivot Table, Power Query, Lookup, Dashboard

    • Microsoft PowerPoint untuk penyajian laporan analitis

  • Mampu menyusun database operasional BMHP (stok, pemakaian, kedaluwarsa, penjualan).

4. Sistem & Tools (Nilai Tambah)

  • Pengalaman menggunakan:

    • ERP / sistem logistik (misalnya Odoo, SAP, atau SIMRS)

    • Business Intelligence Tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

  • Dasar pemrograman SQL / Python / R untuk pengolahan data menjadi nilai tambah.

5. Kompetensi Analitis & Bisnis

  • Mampu melakukan:

    • Analisis tren penggunaan dan penjualan BMHP

    • Analisis efisiensi stok dan perputaran barang

    • Forecasting kebutuhan BMHP berbasis data historis

  • Mampu menyajikan data menjadi rekomendasi strategis bagi manajemen.

6. Kemampuan Administratif & Dokumentasi

  • Mampu menyusun:

    • Laporan periodik (harian, bulanan, tahunan)

    • Rekap data operasional dan bisnis

    • Data pendukung audit dan evaluasi proyek

  • Memahami prinsip akurasi, validasi, dan keamanan data.

7. Soft Skills

  • Teliti, sistematis, dan memiliki perhatian tinggi terhadap detail.

  • Mampu bekerja dengan data dalam jumlah besar dan tenggat waktu ketat.

  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menjelaskan hasil analisis kepada tim non-teknis.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim lintas fungsi.

8. Etika Kerja & Kepatuhan

  • Menjunjung tinggi kerahasiaan dan integritas data.

  • Memahami kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan internal perusahaan dan regulasi sektor kesehatan.

9. Persyaratan Umum

  • Sehat jasmani dan rohani.

  • Bersedia bekerja dengan sistem target dan deadline.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan sesuai kebutuhan lini bisnis/proyek.

description: We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our...
jobDescriptionHtml:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!

‎ 

‎ 

Job Description

We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. In this role, you will leverage data to drive insights, support decision-making, and provide actionable recommendations that will shape the direction of our products and business strategies. Some of the key responsibilities that you will have are:

  • Database: design, test, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Data Engineering) to enable, extract, or enrich data/data pipeline.

  • Reporting: design, build, and disseminate dashboards or other self-served data products to enable stakeholders get quick business performance, conduct data exploration, or derive quick insights.

  • Analysis: design, perform, and disseminate descriptive or diagnostic analyses with valuable findings and actionable insights to better understand the business.

  • Experimentation: design, analyze, and disseminate experiments or causal-impact studies to test multiple hypotheses, variants, or initiatives and infer the best result(s) based on relevant success metrics.

  • Modeling: design, develop, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist) to deploy supervised or unsupervised models as per business needs to optimize business performance.

‎ 

Requirements

Several openings are available across multiple domains and levels

  • Bachelor/Master's degree majoring in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computers/Informatics, Engineering, Economics, or equivalent

  • Good communication, presentation, and storytelling skills to deliver data-inspired findings, also passionate in data, analysis, or insights with high curiosity character.

  • 2-5 years of full time data analyst experience (open for prior experience in scientist and engineerr).

  • 2-5 years of hands-on experience with SQL, spreadsheet, and R/Python.

  • 2=5 years of dashboarding experience with BI or dataviz tools (Tableau, Looker Studio, Domo etc.).

  • Prior experience in conducting statistical experimentation or A/B testing is a plus.

  • Prior experience in developing unsupervised/supervised models is a plus.

  • Prior experience in working on cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure, etc.) is a plus.

‎ 

If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

description: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and transformations to ensure reliable data flow and optimized data models across systems.
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows.

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization.


Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration.

  2. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

  3. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies.

  5. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability.

  6. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus.

  • Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome.

  • Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow.

  • Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation.

  • Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis.

  • Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions.

  • Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment.

Technical skills:

  • SQL, Python, or Scala.

  • TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend).

  • Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift).

  • CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins)

Soft skills:

  • Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions.

  • Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value.

  • Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users.

  • Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs.

  • Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes.

  • Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

description: We’re seeking candidates with the right skills and experience for this role. Think you match the profile? Reach out to us, we'd love to hear from you!
jobDescriptionHtml:
An Azure Databricks Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, implementing, and maintaining data solutions within the Azure ecosystem. This role requires close collaboration with various teams to gather data requirements, build scalable data pipelines, and ensure the overall solution is reliable, available, and optimized for high performance.

Outlined below are the potential roles and responsibilities of an Azure Databricks Engineer:

Data Integration and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load):

  • Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines and ETL processes using Azure Databricks and other Azure services. These processes are designed to extract data from multiple sources, transform it into meaningful formats, and load it into data lakes or data warehouses.

  • A key aspect of this responsibility is ensuring that data is accurately cleaned, transformed, and loaded to enable consistent and reliable analytics and reporting.

Data Management and Storage:

  • Implement data storage solutions leveraging Azure Databricks and Azure Data Lake Storage

  • Your role involves designing data storage systems that scale, perform well, and meet the organization’s requirements.

Monitoring and Troubleshooting:

  • Implement monitoring and alerting systems to proactively detect and resolve issues within data pipelines.

  • Continuously oversee data storage and processing activities, ensuring optimal performance and addressing any operational challenges.

  • Perform performance tuning and optimization of Azure Databricks and other data processing tools.

  • Enhance data pipeline efficiency, reliability, and cost-effectiveness by applying best practices and aligning with industry standards.

Collaboration and Communication:

  • Azure Databricks Engineers actively engage with data scientists, business analysts, and other key stakeholders to align technical solutions with business goals.

  • Strong communication skills are essential for translating business requirements into effective technical implementations.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

  • Demonstrated experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role, with a strong track record of designing and implementing data solutions using Azure Databricks.

  • Proficient in SQL, T-SQL, Python, or other relevant programming languages for data transformation and processing.

  • Solid understanding of data integration strategies, ETL techniques, and data warehousing principles.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, with expertise in diagnosing complex data issues and optimizing pipeline performance and reliability.

  • Excellent communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and engage with various stakeholders.

Preferred Additional Skills:

  • Familiarity with tools such as Azure Databricks for big data processing, Power BI for data visualization, and Azure Stream Analytics for real-time data analysis.

  • Familiarity with data security best practices and data governance frameworks

  • Flexible to report onsite at any of Manila office locations: Alabang, BGC, Cubao and Mandaluyong City
title: Azure Databricks Data Engineer

description: Quality Control Engineer (QC Laboratory), supervisor level
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:
- Bertanggung jawab memastikan akurasi, stabilitas, dan keandalan hasil analisa yang digunakan untuk proses produksi dan kontrol kualitas di smelter nickel.
- Mengoperasikan dan melakukan preventive maintenance pada XRF & EOS/OES.
- Menangani troubleshooting alat seperti drift, vacuum error, spark instability, dan detector issue.
- Melakukan kalibrasi, drift correction, validasi metode, dan evaluasi control chart.
- Mengawasi proses preparasi sampel (drying, grinding, pelleting, fusion).
- Melakukan analisa unsur ore, slag, matte, dan alloy menggunakan XRF & EOS.
- Menyusun laporan hasil analisa, logbook maintenance, dan QC report.
- Menjamin kepatuhan terhadap standar ISO 17025, K3 laboratorium, dan keselamatan radiasi.

Kualifikasi:
- Pendidikan minimal S1 Kimia, Teknik Kimia, Metalurgi, Fisika, atau bidang terkait.
- Pengalaman minimal 2–4 tahun di laboratorium mineral/metal, smelter, mining, atau geoscience lab.
- WAJIB berpengalaman mengoperasikan dan merawat: XRF Bruker, XRF ARL 9900, XRF PANalytical, EOS/OES ARL 8860
- Memahami prinsip spektroskopi, sample preparation, CRM, dan evaluasi QC data.
- Mampu menggunakan software instrument (OXSAS, SuperQ, SpectraPlus, dsb.).
- Teliti, mampu bekerja cepat, dan memiliki kemampuan problem-solving yang baik.
- Sertifikasi ISO 17025 (nilai tambah)
- Pengalaman di smelter nickel / ferronickel / NPI
- Familiar dengan LIMS dan integrasi data laboratorium
- Penempatan di Pulau Obi, Maluku Utara.
- Sistem Kerja Roster 9 minggu onsite & 2 minggu offsite
title: Quality Control Engineer (QC Laboratory)

description: Tingkatkan karier Anda dalam lingkungan kerja yang dinamis. Tawaran kompetitif, fasilitas modern, dan pengembangan keterampilan.
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kesempatan
PT Tirta Alam Segar, perusahaan manufaktur minuman yang terkemuka di Indonesia, sedang mencari Supervisor QA Packaging yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Cibitung - Bekasi, Jawa Barat. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan bertanggung jawab menjaga kualitas dan keamanan produk kami melalui pengawasan proses pengemasan dan pemantauan kepatuhan terhadap standar industri.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Bertanggung jawab memastikan penerapan dan pengendalian mutu pada seluruh proses packaging, meliputi injeksi preform, injeksi closure, blowing botol, dan proses packing botol.

  • Berkoordinasi dalam evaluasi serta tindak lanjut atas temuan kualitas guna memastikan konsistensi mutu sesuai standar yang ditetapkan.

  • Melakukan inspeksi dan pengujian kualitas produk dengan cermat untuk memastikan kesesuaian dengan spesifikasi yang ditetapkan

  • Mengawasi dan mengevaluasi kinerja tim QA untuk memastikan kepatuhan terhadap prosedur dan protokol kualitas

  • Mengidentifikasi dan menyelidiki masalah kualitas, serta mengambil tindakan korektif yang tepat

  • Memantau dan menganalisis data kualitas untuk mengidentifikasi tren dan peluang perbaikan

  • Berkolaborasi dengan departemen terkait untuk mengatasi masalah kualitas dan mengoptimalkan proses produksi

Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan

  • Pendidikan minimal D3/S1 Teknik Kimia, Teknik Industri, Kimia, atau Teknologi Pangan

  • Minimum 3 tahun pengalaman dalam peran Supervisor Quality Control melakukan pengawasan dan manajemen kualitas di industri manufaktur, khususnya dalam sektor minuman

  • Memahami penggunaan rigid packaging (botol PET) di industri minuman beserta proses produksinya, termasuk mesin blowing bottle, injection preform, injection closure, serta penggunaan flexible packaging (secondary packaging)

  • Memahami proses pengemasan dan teknik pengujian kualitas yang relevan

  • Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, baik secara lisan maupun tertulis, untuk berinteraksi dan koordinasi lintas departemen (Produksi, Engineering, Warehouse, dan pihak terkait lainnya)

  • Pemikiran kritis, berorientasi pada detail, dan kemampuan pemecahan masalah yang kuat

  • Memiliki kemampuan kepemimpinan yang baik dalam mengelola tim

  • Mampu melakukan evaluasi data kualitas dan menyusun laporan secara sistematis

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisa dan pemecahan masalah terkait isu kualitas di area packaging

  • Familiar dengan GMP, HACCP, FSSC 22000, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, dan penerapan 5S

  • Bersedia bekerja dg ketentuan jam kerja: Senin–Jumat (08.00-16.00), Sabtu setengah hari (08.00-13.00).

  • Bersedia di tempatkan di Kawasan Industri MM2100 Cibitung Bekasi

Manfaat Utama

  • Gaji yang kompetitif

  • Kesempatan untuk mengembangkan karier dalam perusahaan yang sedang bertumbuh

  • Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan mendukung, dengan fokus pada pembelajaran dan pengembangan diri

Tentang PT Tirta Alam Segar
PT Tirta Alam Segar adalah produsen minuman terkemuka di Indonesia dan berpengalaman dalam industri. Kami berkomitmen untuk menyediakan produk berkualitas tinggi dan inovatif, serta menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang mendukung pertumbuhan dan pengembangan karyawan. Menjadi bagian dari tim kami berarti Anda akan memiliki kesempatan untuk berkontribusi pada pertumbuhan bisnis kami dan mendorong industri manufaktur Indonesia ke arah yang lebih baik.


Tertarik untuk bergabung dengan kami? Lamar sekarang dan menjadi bagian dari tim QA kami yang dinamis!

description: Evaluate AI in real-world developer workflows. No AI background needed. Create terminal challenges and solutions, fully remote.
jobDescriptionHtml:
ABOUT THE PROJECT
The Terminal Bench Project evaluates and improves how Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and Claude perform in real-world developer environments (terminal-based workflows).
 
This is not a simple labeling job. Your role is to create practical, real-world development tasks that test whether an AI model can solve problems like an actual developer.

You will design terminal-style developer challenges (Prompts) and write detailed solutions (Solutions) that demonstrate the correct reasoning and steps.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

  • Create realistic terminal-based development problems (Prompts)

  • Write clear, correct solution steps and final answers (Solutions)

    Production software development is not required.
    You may freely design tasks within your own technical expertise.


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR
You are a good fit if you have experience in any of the following areas:

  • System configuration & environment setup

  • Build, compilation, and dependency management

  • Data/file processing (ETL) and scripting

  • General software engineering

  • Debugging & troubleshooting

  • Interactive systems, simulation, or game-related development

  • Search engine development

  • Compiler or language tooling development

Even if your experience is not listed here, we are always excited to meet engineers with broad domain knowledge and the motivation to explore new challenges. Feel free to apply.

COMPENSATION & WORK STYLE

  • Rp 410,000 / hour

  • Fully remote - Work from anywhere, on your own schedule

  • Participate at your own pace based on your schedule

PROJECT DURATION

  • Long-term project: 6+ months(minimum)

  • Preference for contributors available for long-term participation

PROCESS

  1. Resume Screening

  2. Screening Test

  3. Onboarding Session for Selected Candidates

  4. Join Our Project!

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your application, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next step.

description: Manages non-technical services, vendors, and facility operations to ensure building condition, service quality, compliance, professional data center
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities

  • Lead 24/7 Shift of Operation & Maintenance both routine and emergency service on a variety of state-of-f-the-art critical systems such as: medium voltage switchgear, diesel generators, UPS systems, power distribution equipment, chillers, cooling towers, computer room air handlers, fire detection / suppression; building monitoring systems; etc.

  • Ensure the completion of the maintenance activities to the highest quality level of planification, preparation, execution, and reporting.

  • Ensure the full reliability of the infrastructures with the focus on continuity of services, energy efficiency and budgetary constraints.

  • Use the BMS (Backup Management System) and all available systems and do regular walkthroughs to keep up to date at all time the appropriate monitoring on site

  • Participate in the implementation of the site-specific crisis management plan and in the tests and implementation exercises concerning this plan.

  • Monitor very closely the capacities of the infrastructure equipment at their different levels and their load of use / demand, and report back to the Site Manager.

  • Anticipate the impact of the future development of customer loads on these infrastructures.

  • Participate with the construction team to any site construction phase including the commissioning, and specifically to ensure service continuity to the customers.

  • Actively contribute to all improvement actions in the site PUE.

  • Proactively raise awareness of the need to increase the power level that is contractually agreed with the energy provider.

  • Develop energy quality indicators as provided on behalf of infrastructures, by keeping appropriate records.

  • Ensure highest standards of cleanliness by adapting the ad-d-hoc services.

  • Beyond the context of the technical infrastructures of the Data Centre area, manage all services/suppliers concerned and the overall condition and presentation of the building

  • With the assistance of the IT and Controls departments, ensure the proper operation of the site’s BMS.

  • Ensure that resources allow for the monitoring of infrastructures and their use at all times and as closely and as efficiently as possible.

  • Support and monitor the maintenance service providers daily and keep up to date the Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS) in accordance with Company’s requirements.

  • Participate in regular audits which are designed to assess the level of service continuity and analyse risks.

  • Implement improvement plans arising from the observations made during audits or in response to incidents arising in the infrastructures.


Qualifications & Requirements

Education

  • Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Facilities Engineering, or related technical discipline

  • Professional certifications related to Data Center / Critical Facilities are highly preferred

Experience

  • Minimum 5–8 years of experience in Data Center Operations, Critical Facilities, or Mission-Critical Infrastructure

  • At least 2–3 years in a leadership or shift lead role managing 24/7 operations

  • Strong hands-on experience with:

    • Medium Voltage (MV) & Low Voltage (LV) switchgear

    • Diesel generators & fuel systems

    • UPS systems & power distribution

    • Chillers, cooling towers, CRAC/CRAH

    • Fire detection & suppression systems

    • Building Management System (BMS)

    • CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System)

Technical Competencies

  • Strong knowledge of electrical and mechanical critical systems

  • Proven experience in:

    • Preventive & corrective maintenance planning

    • Emergency response & incident management

    • Commissioning and site construction phases

    • Capacity monitoring & load management

    • Energy efficiency & PUE optimization

  • Understanding of energy quality indicators and infrastructure performance reporting

  • Familiar with audit processes, risk assessment, and improvement plan implementation

Operational & Management Skills

  • Experience leading 24/7 shift operations and on-call emergency response

  • Strong ability to:

    • Manage vendors, contractors, and service providers

    • Monitor SLA performance and service continuity

    • Coordinate with IT, Controls, Construction, and Project teams

  • Excellent planning, execution, documentation, and reporting skills

  • Budget awareness and cost optimization mindset

Compliance & Safety

  • Strong understanding of:

    • Health, Safety & Environment (HSE)

    • Crisis management and business continuity planning

    • Industry standards (TIA-942, Uptime Institute, ISO, or equivalent – preferred)

  • Experience participating in crisis simulation and emergency drills

Soft Skills

  • Strong leadership and decision-making skills under pressure

  • High sense of ownership and accountability

  • Excellent communication skills (written & verbal)

  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and continuous improvement mindset

  • Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, mission-critical environment

Language

  • English: Professional working proficiency (mandatory)

description: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and transformations to ensure reliable data flow and optimized data models across systems.
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows.

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization.


Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration.

  2. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

  3. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies.

  5. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability.

  6. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus.

  • Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome.

  • Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow.

  • Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation.

  • Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis.

  • Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions.

  • Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment.

Technical skills:

  • SQL, Python, or Scala.

  • TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend).

  • Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift).

  • CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins)

jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a Data Scientist / AI & Machine Learning Engineer with strong experience in building end-to-end Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions. This role will be responsible for designing scalable AI architectures, developing predictive and Generative AI models (RAG, Agentic AI), and deploying production-ready solutions on cloud platforms such as Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with MLOps, large-scale data processing, and delivering AI solutions in real-world enterprise environments.


Job Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deploy Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions.

  • Build and maintain end-to-end ML pipelines, including data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, deployment, and monitoring.

  • Develop Generative AI applications, such as:

    • LLM-based chatbots

    • Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

    • Agentic AI / Multi-Agent systems using LangChain and LangGraph

  • Design and implement cloud architectures on Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Dialogflow, etc.) and/or AWS.

  • Develop and optimize models for forecasting, classification, and regression use cases.

  • Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, and engineers to translate business requirements into AI-driven solutions.

  • Optimize model performance, scalability, and reliability in production environments.

  • Apply MLOps best practices, including CI/CD for ML, automation, and monitoring.

  • Provide technical leadership, guidance, and best practices to team members.


Job Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Informatics, Data Science, or related fields (Master’s degree is a plus).

  • 1+ years of experience as a Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, or AI Engineer.

  • Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in:

    • Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI

    • MLOps and automated ML pipelines

  • Proficiency in Python (required); experience with R, Javascript, or C++ is a plus.

  • Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage, etc.).

  • Experience with AWS is a plus.

  • Experience with Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB) and relational/non-relational databases.

  • Proven experience developing LLM-based applications, including chatbots, RAG, and Agentic AI.

  • Solid understanding of cloud architecture, data engineering, and scalable systems.

  • Cloud and/or Machine Learning certifications (e.g., Google Cloud, Professional ML Engineer) are a strong plus.

  • Strong problem-solving skills, good communication abilities, and the ability to work independently or in a team.

description: Evaluate AI in real-world developer workflows. No AI background needed. Create terminal challenges and solutions, fully remote.
jobDescriptionHtml:
ABOUT THE PROJECT
The Terminal Bench Project evaluates and improves how Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and Claude perform in real-world developer environments (terminal-based workflows).
 
This is not a simple labeling job. Your role is to create practical, real-world development tasks that test whether an AI model can solve problems like an actual developer.

You will design terminal-style developer challenges (Prompts) and write detailed solutions (Solutions) that demonstrate the correct reasoning and steps.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

  • Create realistic terminal-based development problems (Prompts)

  • Write clear, correct solution steps and final answers (Solutions)

    Production software development is not required.
    You may freely design tasks within your own technical expertise.


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR
You are a good fit if you have experience in any of the following areas:

  • System configuration & environment setup

  • Build, compilation, and dependency management

  • Data/file processing (ETL) and scripting

  • General software engineering

  • Debugging & troubleshooting

  • Interactive systems, simulation, or game-related development

  • Search engine development

  • Compiler or language tooling development

Even if your experience is not listed here, we are always excited to meet engineers with broad domain knowledge and the motivation to explore new challenges. Feel free to apply.

COMPENSATION & WORK STYLE

  • Rp 410,000 / hour

  • Fully remote - Work from anywhere, on your own schedule

  • Participate at your own pace based on your schedule

PROJECT DURATION

  • Long-term project: 6+ months(minimum)

  • Preference for contributors available for long-term participation

PROCESS

  1. Resume Screening

  2. Screening Test

  3. Onboarding Session for Selected Candidates

  4. Join Our Project!

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your application, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next step.

About the role

We are seeking a skilled Risk Analytics & MIS professional to join our dynamic team at PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia. As a contract position, you will be responsible for providing strategic insights and analytical support to drive the company's risk management and operational efficiency. This is an excellent opportunity to contribute to the growth and success of our fintech organisation.

What you'll be doing

  1. Conduct in-depth risk analysis and develop tailored risk models to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks

  2. Gather, analyse, and interpret complex data to generate comprehensive management information systems (MIS) reports

  3. Analyze and monitor month-to-month data trends from multiple data sources (SLIK, FDC, CBI, multiplatform, telco, KYC, etc.) to generate actionable insights and drive data-driven decisions in credit risk management

  4. Develop and test new feature engineering strategies for credit scoring models, focusing on improving predictive accuracy and model performance

  5. Conduct comprehensive evaluation and backtesting of features to ensure robustness, scalability, and alignment with business objectives in underwriting processes.

  6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance decision-making processes and improve operational performance

  7. Develop and maintain advanced analytical tools and dashboards to provide real-time visibility into key business metrics using tools like Looker and BigQuery

  8. Stay abreast of industry trends, regulations, and best practices to ensure compliance and continuous improvement

  9. Provide strategic guidance and recommendations to senior management on risk management and operational strategies

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in risk analytics, financial analysis, or a related field

  2. Strong proficiency in data analysis, modelling with clean, readable coding style, and visualization tools (such as Python, SQL Power BI, Tableau)

  3. Strong knowledge of data science tools: Numpy, Pandas, or SciPy; expertise in at least one backend framework: Flask, Django, or Jupyter Notebook

  4. Proficiency in mainstream databases: MySQL, MongoDB, Hive SQL, or similar technologies

  5. Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and decision-making skills

  6. Proven track record of delivering impactful insights and driving operational improvements

  7. Working knowledge of financial regulations, risk management principles, and industry best practices

  8. Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Statistics, Mathematic or a related quantitative field

What we offer

At PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia, we are committed to providing a rewarding and supportive work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer opportunities for professional development, collaborative work environment, and a range of benefits to promote work-life balance.

About us

PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia is a leading fintech company dedicated to driving innovation in the banking and financial services industry. With a focus on digital transformation and customer-centric solutions, we are revolutionising the way people and businesses access and manage their finances. Join our dynamic team and be a part of our exciting journey.

Apply now to become our next Risk Analytics & MIS professional!

description: Evaluate AI in real-world developer workflows. No AI background needed. Create terminal challenges and solutions, fully remote.
jobDescriptionHtml:
ABOUT THE PROJECT
The Terminal Bench Project evaluates and improves how Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and Claude perform in real-world developer environments (terminal-based workflows).
 
This is not a simple labeling job. Your role is to create practical, real-world development tasks that test whether an AI model can solve problems like an actual developer.

You will design terminal-style developer challenges (Prompts) and write detailed solutions (Solutions) that demonstrate the correct reasoning and steps.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

  • Create realistic terminal-based development problems (Prompts)

  • Write clear, correct solution steps and final answers (Solutions)

    Production software development is not required.
    You may freely design tasks within your own technical expertise.


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR
You are a good fit if you have experience in any of the following areas:

  • System configuration & environment setup

  • Build, compilation, and dependency management

  • Data/file processing (ETL) and scripting

  • General software engineering

  • Debugging & troubleshooting

  • Interactive systems, simulation, or game-related development

  • Search engine development

  • Compiler or language tooling development

Even if your experience is not listed here, we are always excited to meet engineers with broad domain knowledge and the motivation to explore new challenges. Feel free to apply.

COMPENSATION & WORK STYLE

  • Rp 410,000 / hour

  • Fully remote - Work from anywhere, on your own schedule

  • Participate at your own pace based on your schedule

PROJECT DURATION

  • Long-term project: 6+ months(minimum)

  • Preference for contributors available for long-term participation

PROCESS

  1. Resume Screening

  2. Screening Test

  3. Onboarding Session for Selected Candidates

  4. Join Our Project!

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your application, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next step.

description: We are looking for a Technical Solution Engineer who can learn new technologies independently, validate concepts through hands-on implementation
jobDescriptionHtml:
Position Overview

We are looking for a Technical Solution Engineer who can learn new technologies independently, validate concepts through hands-on implementation, and apply them to real business processes.

We value engineers who can explore, experiment, verify, and implement solutions based on technical judgment and evidence.

This role focuses on integrating external APIs, developing workflow logic, and converting traditional business processes into efficient, automated operational flows.

You will work with internal service components and various open-source tools to build reliable, scenario-based automation that aligns with customer requirements.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and integrate external APIs into internal systems or workflows

  • Implement scenario-based logic, decision flows, and automation sequences

  • Conduct hands-on testing, PoC experiments, and verification of new features

  • Analyze business requirements and translate them into technical workflows

  • Build small-scale backend scripts (Python/Node.js) to validate or connect services

  • Debug API communication, structure JSON payloads, and manage request/response flows

  • Collaborate with solution, product, and platform teams to deliver customer-ready features

  • Document logic flows, test results, and integration guidelines

Required Qualifications

  • 2–5 years of experience in backend development, system integration, or API-based services

  • Hands-on development experience using Python, Node.js, or Java

  • Strong understanding of REST APIs, JSON structures, authentication mechanisms

  • Ability to design and implement small automation tasks or workflow logic

  • Familiarity with Postman, cURL, API debugging, and testing tools

  • Ability to learn new tools and frameworks quickly and validate them through direct implementation

  • Comfortable reading technical documentation and adapting open-source components

  • Ability to analyze a business process and convert it into an API-driven execution flow

Preferred Skills

  • Experience with chatbot flows, conversation logic, or rule-based automation

  • Familiarity with workflow engines or serverless architectures

  • Experience integrating third-party APIs into production systems

  • Understanding of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP) and basic DevOps practices

  • Exposure to monitoring tools and debugging distributed systems

  • Experience working with SaaS products or customer-facing technical solutions

What We Value

  • Self-Learning: Ability to quickly learn new technologies and convert learning into real implementation

  • Verification Mindset: Habit of verifying assumptions through hands-on testing before deployment

  • Technical Problem-Solving: Using data, logs, and reproducible results—not opinions—to make decisions

  • Build-Up Mentality: Improving workflows step by step through continuous experimentation

  • Ownership: Managing tasks independently with responsibility and discipline

  • Clarity in Logic: Ability to express business logic as structured technical flows

Why Join Us

This role is ideal for engineers who want to:

  • Move beyond routine development and apply technical skills directly to real business operations

  • Work in a company that values self-driven learning and technical growth over titles

  • Build practical AI-enabled solutions through experimentation and hands-on integration

  • Become a core member shaping how AI-driven workflows will operate in Indonesian enterprises

  • Grow into a lead role in AI-assisted business automation and technical solution delivery

be developing AI-powered features for commercialized products that are directly used by real
patients, doctors, nurses, and healthcare providers.
You will work closely with senior engineers to design, build, and deploy intelligent systems
across multiple domains, including conversational AI, audio, text, vision, and real time decision
systems. This role offers hands on exposure to production AI systems where reliability, safety,
and user experience are critical, and where your work has direct, tangible impact on patient care
and clinical workflows.

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in building and maintaining AI pipelines across text, audio, vision, and multimodal
    use cases.

  • Develop and integrate solutions using LLMs, embeddings, and generative models.

  • Build and optimize pipelines for speech, text, and conversation understanding,
    including transcription, summarization, sentiment analysis, and context management.

  • Support real-time and asynchronous AI systems, including streaming, event-driven,
    or background processing pipelines.

  • Apply machine learning techniques (supervised and unsupervised) for tasks such as
    classification, clustering, detection, and embeddings.

  • Contribute to context-aware decision logic, alerting, or recommendation systems.

  • Build and maintain REST APIs and webhooks to expose AI services to web and mobile
    applications.

  • Monitor, evaluate, and improve the performance, reliability, and cost-efficiency of
    deployed AI features.

  • Collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to improve user experience
    and system behavior.

Required Skills

  • Strong proficiency in Python, with an emphasis on clean, maintainable, and testable
    code.

  • Solid understanding of speech processing pipelines, including ASR, VAD, and
    diarization concepts.

  • Hands-on experience with Whisper or similar speech-to-text models.

  • Familiarity with wake word detection or keyword spotting systems.

  • Hands-on experience with LLMs and prompt-based or retrieval-augmented workflows.

  • Familiarity with NLP, speech, or computer vision tasks and tooling.

  • Experience building and consuming REST APIs, webhooks, and streaming services.

  • Basic familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS preferred) and audio pipeline deployment.

  • Willingness to learn real-time systems, streaming architectures, and production
    observability.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Minimum 2 years of professional experience in AI/ML or backend systems.

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

  • Experience deploying production-grade AI products used by real users.

  • Demonstrable experience in audio AI engineering, through professional work, research,
    or personal projects.

  • Experience with real-time or streaming architectures (e.g., WebSockets, gRPC,
    message queues).

  • Familiarity with speaker diarization, audio embeddings, or acoustic feature extraction.

  • Exposure to audio-focused ML frameworks (PyTorch, torchaudio, librosa).

  • Understanding of asynchronous programming, concurrency, and low-latency system
    design.

  • Experience deploying AI services using Docker and CI/CD pipelines.

  • Interest in building interactive, conversational, or assistive AI systems that operate
    continuously in real-world environments
title: AI/ML Engineer

description: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and transformations to ensure reliable data flow and optimized data models across systems.
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows.

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization.


Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration.

  2. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

  3. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies.

  5. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability.

  6. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus.

  • Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome.

  • Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow.

  • Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation.

  • Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis.

  • Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions.

  • Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment.

Technical skills:

  • SQL, Python, or Scala.

  • TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend).

  • Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift).

  • CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins)

Soft skills:

  • Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions.

  • Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value.

  • Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users.

  • Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs.

  • Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes.

  • Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

description: Evaluate AI in real-world developer workflows. No AI background needed. Create terminal challenges and solutions, fully remote.
jobDescriptionHtml:
ABOUT THE PROJECT
The Terminal Bench Project evaluates and improves how Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT and Claude perform in real-world developer environments (terminal-based workflows).
 
This is not a simple labeling job. Your role is to create practical, real-world development tasks that test whether an AI model can solve problems like an actual developer.

You will design terminal-style developer challenges (Prompts) and write detailed solutions (Solutions) that demonstrate the correct reasoning and steps.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

  • Create realistic terminal-based development problems (Prompts)

  • Write clear, correct solution steps and final answers (Solutions)

    Production software development is not required.
    You may freely design tasks within your own technical expertise.


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR
You are a good fit if you have experience in any of the following areas:

  • System configuration & environment setup

  • Build, compilation, and dependency management

  • Data/file processing (ETL) and scripting

  • General software engineering

  • Debugging & troubleshooting

  • Interactive systems, simulation, or game-related development

  • Search engine development

  • Compiler or language tooling development

Even if your experience is not listed here, we are always excited to meet engineers with broad domain knowledge and the motivation to explore new challenges. Feel free to apply.

COMPENSATION & WORK STYLE

  • Rp 410,000 / hour

  • Fully remote - Work from anywhere, on your own schedule

  • Participate at your own pace based on your schedule

PROJECT DURATION

  • Long-term project: 6+ months(minimum)

  • Preference for contributors available for long-term participation

PROCESS

  1. Resume Screening

  2. Screening Test

  3. Onboarding Session for Selected Candidates

  4. Join Our Project!

HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your application, and shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next step.

description: Data Analyst manages accurate data, builds dashboards, analyzes trends, and delivers insights for maintenance, finance, and operations.
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Summary

The Data Analyst is responsible for managing data for analysis, and performance evaluation to support management decision-making. This role ensures data accuracy, data integrity, and reliability while delivering actionable insights through dashboards and analytical reports. The position works closely with Maintenance, Finance, and operation teams to improve performance monitoring system and data-driven initiatives.

Responsibilities

  • Manage data accuracy, integrity, and reliability of performance in accordance with company standards.

  • Develop and maintain dashboards, visual reports, and performance tracking tools for maintenance and operational.

  • Analyze maintenance, financial, and operational data to identify trends, performance gaps, and improvement opportunities.

  • Support Root Cause Analysis (RCA) by providing historical data, failure trends, and analytical insights.

  • Support configuration, update, and enhancement of CMMS and maintenance data systems (e.g., PRONTO, AMS).

  • Coordinate with Finance and Maintenance teams to ensure accurate reporting, cost analysis, and KPI monitoring.

  • Support audits and performance reviews through accurate and reliable data reporting.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in Finance & Accounting/ Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in Industrial Engineering or related field.

  • Minimum 2 years of experience as a Data Analyst, Maintenance Analyst, Financial Analyst, Cost Analyst, or equivalent role.

  • Strong capability in data analysis, integration, and performance reporting.

  • Experience using maintenance and performance systems (PRONTO, QlikView, AMS, or similar).

  • Strong understanding of financial and performance analysis tools (Cognos, Remesys, or similar).

  • Familiar with mining equipment and processing plant environments is preferred.

  • Expert-level proficiency in Power BI (data modeling, DAX, dashboard development, and visualization).

  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint.

  • Strong communication and coordination skills.

description: Contribute to fintech innovation as a risk analytics expert with growth opportunities and collaborative work environment.
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a skilled Risk Analytics & MIS professional to join our dynamic team at PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia. As a contract position, you will be responsible for providing strategic insights and analytical support to drive the company's risk management and operational efficiency. This is an excellent opportunity to contribute to the growth and success of our fintech organisation.

What you'll be doing

  1. Conduct in-depth risk analysis and develop tailored risk models to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks

  2. Gather, analyse, and interpret complex data to generate comprehensive management information systems (MIS) reports

  3. Analyze and monitor month-to-month data trends from multiple data sources (SLIK, FDC, CBI, multiplatform, telco, KYC, etc.) to generate actionable insights and drive data-driven decisions in credit risk management

  4. Develop and test new feature engineering strategies for credit scoring models, focusing on improving predictive accuracy and model performance

  5. Conduct comprehensive evaluation and backtesting of features to ensure robustness, scalability, and alignment with business objectives in underwriting processes.

  6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance decision-making processes and improve operational performance

  7. Develop and maintain advanced analytical tools and dashboards to provide real-time visibility into key business metrics using tools like Looker and BigQuery

  8. Stay abreast of industry trends, regulations, and best practices to ensure compliance and continuous improvement

  9. Provide strategic guidance and recommendations to senior management on risk management and operational strategies

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in risk analytics, financial analysis, or a related field

  2. Strong proficiency in data analysis, modelling with clean, readable coding style, and visualization tools (such as Python, SQL Power BI, Tableau)

  3. Strong knowledge of data science tools: Numpy, Pandas, or SciPy; expertise in at least one backend framework: Flask, Django, or Jupyter Notebook

  4. Proficiency in mainstream databases: MySQL, MongoDB, Hive SQL, or similar technologies

  5. Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and decision-making skills

  6. Proven track record of delivering impactful insights and driving operational improvements

  7. Working knowledge of financial regulations, risk management principles, and industry best practices

  8. Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Statistics, Mathematic or a related quantitative field

What we offer

At PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia, we are committed to providing a rewarding and supportive work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer opportunities for professional development, collaborative work environment, and a range of benefits to promote work-life balance.

About us

PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia is a leading fintech company dedicated to driving innovation in the banking and financial services industry. With a focus on digital transformation and customer-centric solutions, we are revolutionising the way people and businesses access and manage their finances. Join our dynamic team and be a part of our exciting journey.

Apply now to become our next Risk Analytics & MIS professional!
