description: Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and transformations to ensure reliable data flow and optimized data models across systems.
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows.

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization.


Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration.

  2. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

  3. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies.

  5. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability.

  6. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus.

  • Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome.

  • Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow.

  • Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation.

  • Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis.

  • Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions.

  • Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment.

Technical skills:

  • SQL, Python, or Scala.

  • TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend).

  • Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift).

  • CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins)

Soft skills:

  • Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions.

  • Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value.

  • Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users.

  • Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs.

  • Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes.

  • Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

description: We’re seeking candidates with the right skills and experience for this role. Think you match the profile? Reach out to us, we'd love to hear from you!
jobDescriptionHtml:
An Azure Databricks Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, implementing, and maintaining data solutions within the Azure ecosystem. This role requires close collaboration with various teams to gather data requirements, build scalable data pipelines, and ensure the overall solution is reliable, available, and optimized for high performance.

Outlined below are the potential roles and responsibilities of an Azure Databricks Engineer:

Data Integration and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load):

  • Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines and ETL processes using Azure Databricks and other Azure services. These processes are designed to extract data from multiple sources, transform it into meaningful formats, and load it into data lakes or data warehouses.

  • A key aspect of this responsibility is ensuring that data is accurately cleaned, transformed, and loaded to enable consistent and reliable analytics and reporting.

Data Management and Storage:

  • Implement data storage solutions leveraging Azure Databricks and Azure Data Lake Storage

  • Your role involves designing data storage systems that scale, perform well, and meet the organization’s requirements.

Monitoring and Troubleshooting:

  • Implement monitoring and alerting systems to proactively detect and resolve issues within data pipelines.

  • Continuously oversee data storage and processing activities, ensuring optimal performance and addressing any operational challenges.

  • Perform performance tuning and optimization of Azure Databricks and other data processing tools.

  • Enhance data pipeline efficiency, reliability, and cost-effectiveness by applying best practices and aligning with industry standards.

Collaboration and Communication:

  • Azure Databricks Engineers actively engage with data scientists, business analysts, and other key stakeholders to align technical solutions with business goals.

  • Strong communication skills are essential for translating business requirements into effective technical implementations.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

  • Demonstrated experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role, with a strong track record of designing and implementing data solutions using Azure Databricks.

  • Proficient in SQL, T-SQL, Python, or other relevant programming languages for data transformation and processing.

  • Solid understanding of data integration strategies, ETL techniques, and data warehousing principles.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, with expertise in diagnosing complex data issues and optimizing pipeline performance and reliability.

  • Excellent communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and engage with various stakeholders.

Preferred Additional Skills:

  • Familiarity with tools such as Azure Databricks for big data processing, Power BI for data visualization, and Azure Stream Analytics for real-time data analysis.

  • Familiarity with data security best practices and data governance frameworks

  • Flexible to report onsite at any of Manila office locations: Alabang, BGC, Cubao and Mandaluyong City
title: Azure Databricks Data Engineer

description: FoxData's Business Development
jobDescriptionHtml:
FoxData is a leading Mobile App Marketing and Intelligence Platform dedicated to empowering app developers, marketers, and product teams with actionable insights and data-driven tools. Our platform helps businesses optimize app visibility, understand market dynamics, monitor performance, and maximize user acquisition strategies on a global scale. At FoxData, we are passionate about innovation, transparency, and performance. We foster a collaborative environment where curiosity, data, and technology intersect to solve complex problems in the mobile ecosystem.

Role Overview

We are currently seeking a highly driven and experienced Business Development Specialist to lead market development efforts and drive strategic partnerships, new client acquisition efforts, primarily targeting the gaming industry; with additional focus on app-based enterprises in the tools and social categories. This role is ideal for individuals who thrive in outbound sales, enjoy building relationships with decision-makers, and can consultatively map client needs to FoxData’s SaaS solutions across App Intelligence, Ads Intelligence, and Marketer Intelligence.

Key Responsibilities

1. New Client Development (Gaming, Tools&Apps, Social Apps, etc)

  • Proactively identify and reach out to potential enterprise clients in mobile gaming, app tools, and social platforms.

  • Leverage multiple channels (cold outreach, industry events, referrals, inbound leads) to build a consistent and qualified sales pipeline.

  • Own the full sales cycle — from prospecting and discovery to pitching, negotiation, and closing.

2. Lead Engagement and Pipeline Management

  • Follow up efficiently on inbound or marketing-generated leads.

  • Maintain clear visibility into the sales pipeline and track conversion performance.

  • Prioritize high-potential leads and develop strategies to accelerate deal progress.

3. Solution-Oriented Client Consultation

  • Deeply understand clients’ user acquisition goals, monetization strategies, and market positioning.

  • Recommend FoxData’s solutions based on their business stage and data needs, including: App Intelligence, Ads Intelligence, Marketer Intelligence.

  • Customize product demos, presentations, and proposals for different client use cases

4. Industry Trends & Feedback Loop

  • Stay updated on the latest trends in mobile gaming and app marketing.

  • Collect and synthesize feedback from prospects and clients to support product and go-to-market improvement.

  • Represent FoxData at key events and webinars to enhance brand visibility and capture market insights.

Qualifications

  1. Bachelor’s Degree or above in Business, Marketing, or related field.

  2. With 2+ years of B2B Business Development or Sales experience, preferably in Mobile Marketing/App, Digital Marketing/App, Ads Intelligence, Data Analytics, Big Data, SaaS.

  3. Strong track record in new client acquisition and consultative selling.

  4. Excellent communication skills with the ability to engage stakeholders at various levels.

  5. Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and adaptable in a fast-paced start-up environment.

  6. Familiarity with CRM tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce) is a plus but not required.

  7. Must be fluent in English, English can be used as a working language.

  8. Fully Work-From-Office (WFO), Mon-Fri, placement in Sudirman, South Jakarta.

description: Sales B2B Textile bertanggung jawab mengelola pelanggan, menganalisis data penjualan, menyusun strategi, dan mencapai target bisnis.
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi pekerjaan

PT Jaya Mitra Kurnia, sebuah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang penjualan produk Textile, sedang mencari seorang Sales B2B yang berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Bandung, Jawa Barat. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam mengelola tim penjualan dan memastikan tercapainya target penjualan.

Kualifikasi Umum:

1. Pendidikan minimal S1 (Manajemen, Marketing, Statistik, Matematika, Ekonomi, atau jurusan relevan).

2. Pengalaman kerja minimal 2-3 tahun di bidang Sales, Trading, atau Data Analyst (Fresh graduate dengan skill analitik dipertimbangkan).

3. Komunikatif, persuasif, dan mampu membangun hubungan baik dengan klien maupun tim internal.

4. Memiliki kemampuan presentasi yang baik dan percaya diri.

5. Mampu bekerja secara tim maupun individu, dengan orientasi target.

6. Memiliki kendaraan pribadi dan SIM C/A menjadi nilai tambah.

7. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik.

8. Memiliki selling skill yang baik.

Kualifikasi Khusus:

1. Memahami proses distribusi dan perdagangan tekstil (B2B dan B2C).

2. Menguasai Ms. Excel (pivot, v-lookup, dashboard) dan tools analitik (Google Data Studio, Power BI, atau sejenisnya).

3. Mampu menganalisis tren penjualan, harga pasar, permintaan produk, serta performa sales.

4. Terampil membuat laporan penjualan yang terukur untuk mendukung strategi bisnis.

5. Mampu memberikan rekomendasi strategi berdasarkan data (data-driven decision making).

6. Terbiasa mengolah data besar (big data sederhana) untuk mendukung forecasting dan inventory control.

7. Diutamakan memiliki pengalaman dalam CRM system atau software penjualan.

Tanggung Jawab Utama:

1. Mengelola dan mengembangkan portofolio pelanggan pada bisnis distribusi tekstil.

2. Melakukan analisis data penjualan, tren pasar, serta perilaku pelanggan.

3. Menyusun strategi penjualan berdasarkan insight dari hasil analisis data.

4. Menyampaikan laporan penjualan, proyeksi, dan rekomendasi strategi kepada Sales Manager.

5. Mencapai target penjualan bulanan/tahunan yang ditetapkan perusahaan.

6. Mendukung tim dalam persiapan tender, negosiasi, serta pengembangan bisnis baru.

Benefit :

1. Gaji yang kompetitif dan bonus berdasarkan kinerja.

2. Asuransi kesehatan yang komprehensif dan tunjangan lainnya.

3. Kesempatan untuk pengembangan karier dan pelatihan yang berkelanjutan.

4. Lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan kolaboratif.

5. Budaya perusahaan yang mendukung keseimbangan kehidupan-kerja.

Tentang Kami

PT Jaya Mitra Kurnia adalah perusahaan yang terkemuka di bidang penjualan produk Garment dan Textile di Indonesia. Kami berkomitmen untuk menyediakan produk berkualitas tinggi dan layanan pelanggan yang unggul. Tim kami terdiri dari profesional yang berdedikasi dan berpengalaman, yang bekerja sama untuk mencapai tujuan kami: menjadi yang terdepan di industri ini. Kami menghargai keberagaman dan mendorong inovasi, serta menawarkan peluang pengembangan karier yang menarik bagi karyawan kami.

description: Responsible for developing and applying spatial data analysis and geostatistical models to support oil palm research
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description Summary :

Responsible for developing and applying spatial data analysis and geostatistical models to support oil palm research. Key tasks include designing sampling strategies, automating data processing (R/Python, GIS), integrating remote sensing data, managing spatial databases, and translating analytical insights into practical field recommendations


Job Description :

  • Design robust sampling strategies for spatial data collection, including but not limited to soil properties, yield, climate, and drone/remote sensing imagery.

  • Develop scripts and tools using programming languages (e.g., R, Python) and GIS platforms (ArcGIS/QGIS) to automate data processing, modeling, and analytical workflows.

  • Integrate and process remote sensing and satellite imagery into existing spatial models to enhance prediction accuracy and coverage.

  • Contribute to the maintenance and management of large-scale spatial databases (GIS layers, remote sensing data, etc.).

  • Apply sophisticated geostatistical techniques, such as variogram modeling, Kriging, spatial interpolation, and simulation, to raw research data.

  • Analyze and interpret spatial variability in the yield, soil characteristics, nutrient status, and pest/disease incidence.

  • Collaborate closely with Biometrician, GIS specialists, agronomists, plant breeders, pest and disease, and other researchers to translate analytical findings into practical, actionable recommendations.

  • Conduct continuous research to improve and validate spatial analysis methodologies specific to oil palm cultivation.

  • Support decision-making by effectively presenting complex findings using clear, impactful visual formats (e.g., thematic maps, dynamic dashboards, comprehensive reports).

  • Provide specialized training to R&D and field staff on spatial considerations for accurate data handling and interpretation.


Job Requirement :

  • Minimum Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Statistics, Geo-Statistics, Data Science, Spatial Science, or a closely related field.

  • Strong foundational knowledge in statistical principles, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), remote sensing, and data analysis.

  • Proficiency in statistical programming and software (specifically R and/or Python) for spatial data manipulation and modeling.

  • Proficiency in professional GIS software (ArcGIS and/or QGIS).

  • Demonstrated experience with database management systems (SQL) for data querying and retrieval.

  • Proven experience in spatial modeling, geostatistical analysis, and handling big data (especially environmental or agricultural datasets).

  • Excellent analytical, quantitative, and problem-solving abilities with meticulous attention to detail.

  • Effective communication and presentation skills for conveying complex geostatistical data and research findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

  • Ability to work both independently and collaboratively as a key member of a multidisciplinary R&D team.

  • Willingness to be permanently located at the SMART Research Institute in Libo, Kandis, Riau.


"Our company has never levied any fees for the recruitment process nor has it required to order tickets and accommodation through a certain travel agent or certain person"
title: Geo-Statistics Research Officer

description: Join AsetKu as a Credit Reviewer Team Leader in Yogyakarta. Join us to play a key role in credit review and support a trusted financial ecosystem!
jobDescriptionHtml:
Roles and Responsibilities

  1. Supervise KYC (Know Your Customer) agents in the customer review process to ensure compliance with both internal and regulatory requirements in support of the company’s business operations.

  2. Supervise PV (Phone Verification) agents in verifying fund recipients as part of the KYC process, ensuring alignment with internal and external regulations.

  3. Lead the Credit Review team to achieve performance targets while maintaining efficiency and accuracy in KYC and PV verification processes.

  4. Prepare and analyze team performance reports, identify areas for improvement, and provide actionable recommendations for continuous process enhancement.

  5. Report incidents or irregularities related to KYC and PV processes to Risk Management Division.

  6. Develop and/or update Credit Review procedures, ensuring they are approved and aligned with Risk Management policies and regulator.

  7. Collaborate with the QA Team Leader to conduct periodic refreshment training for KYC and PV agents to ensure ongoing compliance with internal and regulatory standards.

  8. Collaborate with QA Team Leader to completing tasks related to CR and QA functions such as completing Internal Audit findings related to the Credit Review (CR) process in line with Quality Assurance (QA), preparing KYC and PV performance report materials as well as mitigating risks for the credit review process such as: daily, weekly and or monthly reports, presentation materials , etc.


Qualifications

  1. Min Bachelor’s degree with major in economic, management, informatics management (information system) are preferred.

  2. Minimum of 3 years of experience with strong knowledge in Credit Review (CR) Process (including Know Your Customer (KYC) and Phone Verification (PV)) with minimum of 1 year experience as Team Leader (TL) are preferred.

  3. Proficiency in spreadsheets for basic analysis and reporting such as (excel, word, PPT) and presentation with looker studio.

  4. Understanding business processes in the financial industry especially in P2P Lending and or Banking industries.

  5. Willing to work offline or online on weekend (if needed)

  6. Good communication, and influencing abilities proactive, self-motivated, positive mindset, detail-oriented, with a strong sense of responsibility and the ability to work independently and in a team.
title: Team Lead Credit Reviewer

description: TamanSchool seeks passionate tutors for national, international, and Olympiad classes.
jobDescriptionHtml:
TamanSchool is expanding its learning ecosystem, empowering students through safe, inspiring, and high-quality education.

We are inviting passionate and competent students and professionals to join us as Tutors for national (Kurikulum Merdeka), international (IB, Cambridge), and olympiad-level classes.

If you love teaching and want to make a real impact, this role is for you.

Job Description (What You Will Do)

  • Teach 1-on-1 or small-group classes (online via Zoom or offline at TamanSchool Bambu Apus). Choose as you wish, but offline is preferred!

  • Deliver lessons for National Curriculum (Kurikulum Merdeka), IGCSE/A-Level, IB, or Olympiad subjects based on your expertise.

  • Prepare learning materials and engaging teaching activities.

  • Track students’ progress and provide monthly reports or feedback.

  • Collaborate with fellow tutors to improve teaching quality.

  • Participate in internal development sessions within the tutor community.

Subjects Needed

  • National: Math, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Economics, Sociology, Geography, History, Bahasa Indonesia

  • Cambridge / A-Level: Math, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Economics, Business, Sociology, CS

  • IB: Math AA/AI, Sciences, Business Management, Economics, English Lit

  • Olympiad: Math, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Astronomy, Informatics, Earth Science, Economics, Geography

Job Requirements (Who We’re Looking For)

Minimum Requirements

  • University student or graduate; outstanding high school students are welcome for selected programs.

  • Strong subject mastery in at least one area (National, IB, Cambridge, or Olympiad).

  • Excellent communication skills and willingness to create a safe learning environment.

  • Comfortable teaching online; stable internet connection for remote sessions.

  • Responsible, punctual, and committed to professional conduct.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Previous tutoring or teaching experience.

  • Awards/achievements in academics, Olympiads, or competitions.

  • Fluent English for international curriculum classes.
title: Tutor

description: Data Scientist, Machine Learning, AI, GCP, Javascript, C++, python, AWS, Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Dialogflow,
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a Data Scientist / AI & Machine Learning Engineer with strong experience in building end-to-end Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions. This role will be responsible for designing scalable AI architectures, developing predictive and Generative AI models (RAG, Agentic AI), and deploying production-ready solutions on cloud platforms such as Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with MLOps, large-scale data processing, and delivering AI solutions in real-world enterprise environments.


Job Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deploy Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI solutions.

  • Build and maintain end-to-end ML pipelines, including data ingestion, preprocessing, model training, deployment, and monitoring.

  • Develop Generative AI applications, such as:

    • LLM-based chatbots

    • Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

    • Agentic AI / Multi-Agent systems using LangChain and LangGraph

  • Design and implement cloud architectures on Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Dialogflow, etc.) and/or AWS.

  • Develop and optimize models for forecasting, classification, and regression use cases.

  • Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, and engineers to translate business requirements into AI-driven solutions.

  • Optimize model performance, scalability, and reliability in production environments.

  • Apply MLOps best practices, including CI/CD for ML, automation, and monitoring.

  • Provide technical leadership, guidance, and best practices to team members.


Job Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Informatics, Data Science, or related fields (Master’s degree is a plus).

  • 1+ years of experience as a Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, or AI Engineer.

  • Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in:

    • Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI

    • MLOps and automated ML pipelines

  • Proficiency in Python (required); experience with R, Javascript, or C++ is a plus.

  • Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage, etc.).

  • Experience with AWS is a plus.

  • Experience with Vector Databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB) and relational/non-relational databases.

  • Proven experience developing LLM-based applications, including chatbots, RAG, and Agentic AI.

  • Solid understanding of cloud architecture, data engineering, and scalable systems.

  • Cloud and/or Machine Learning certifications (e.g., Google Cloud, Professional ML Engineer) are a strong plus.

  • Strong problem-solving skills, good communication abilities, and the ability to work independently or in a team.
title: Data Scientist
